description: Animation track seems to be a placeholder for future content and is unused. It does not fit into anything in the game internally and it's methods go unused (According to DNSpy 07/26/2024 (mm/dd/yyyy))

fields._node: Designed to be used to specify the object being controlled by the animation. Can be used with the Find Animation Track Index ProtoFlux node.
fields._component: Designed to be used to specify the field of the object that is being controlled by the animation. Can be used with the Find Animation Track Index ProtoFlux node.
fields._property: The property on an animation asset
fields.Data: A list of values at specific time intervals to determine what the whole track's value should be at specific times.
